features.name: Define Project Purpose
features.description: Open standard for agent identity + trust attestation. Harness builds it autonomously.

features.name: Research & Validate Landscape
features.description: Confirm gap in agent identity standards, identify prior art (IETF drafts, SPIFFE, Agentic JWT).

features.name: Architecture Plan
features.description: Harness (Python, claude-agent-sdk) + Dashboard (Next.js, Vercel) + Output (spec, SDK, service).

features.name: Client Factory
features.description: claude-agent-sdk client with sandbox, filesystem scoping, bash security hook, Playwright MCP.

features.name: Planner Agent
features.description: Decomposes app_spec.md into feature_list.json with BDD scenarios.

features.name: Generator Agent
features.description: Builds one feature per session, commits after each, updates feature_list.json.

features.name: Evaluator Agent
features.description: Adversarial skeptic with Playwright tools and graded rubric scoring (min 7.0/10).

features.name: Hard Validation Gates
features.description: tsc, eslint, npm build, npm test — must all pass before feature marked done.

features.name: Orchestration Loop
features.description: Main planner→generator→evaluator cycle with retry logic and dashboard push.

features.name: Ingest API Route
features.description: POST /api/ingest — receives harness updates, writes to Upstash Redis.

features.name: SSE Stream Route
features.description: GET /api/stream — polls Redis, pushes diffs to browser via Server-Sent Events.

features.name: Dashboard UI
features.description: 6 cards: status, feature progress, sprint info, commit feed, evaluator scores, cost tracker.

features.name: AIT Claims Schema
features.description: JWT profile with agent-specific claims (agent_type, agent_checksum, owner, trust_domain, delegation).

features.name: Attestation Flow
features.description: SPIFFE bootstrap → Agent IdP → AIT issuance → delegation with capability attenuation.

features.name: Protocol Bindings
features.description: MCP, A2A, and HTTP header specifications for AIT transport.

features.name: Core Token Operations
features.description: createAIT, verifyAIT, delegateAIT, introspectAIT — zero runtime deps, Web Crypto API.
